textByHash.1530632ca4c9dd967309c007dbdfb463fabc67ab: Well... it's an egg, iknami. If it's broken, then there isn't much you can do about that.
textByHash.1663376395febdbca19466edc75d3fc078fbd27f: Yes, I noticed the tourist had an egg with him... I didn't realise it had a name...
textByHash.341e7b728ccd8304f52439df418f3e76c744c232: Don't be. He is no servant of Ranul. He will die the death of a traitor. Once that happens, a more fitting replacement will be chosen.
textByHash.3fde476efca80b0e7a98b75aea88bb69c1a8116b: I'll need to handle that at some point, but they don't seem to be causing much trouble, so it is thankfully not a pressing concern.
textByHash.4752a2199bbd589dde767543561cacc5d8717549: I see... Well, I don't think I can help you, iknami, but good luck.
textByHash.8485b56769dcdfe7419e564cb9d27b8c610a02e6: Tal Teok is thankfully one of the easier holy sites to look after. However, there is a small issue at the moment in that some tourist has decided to move in and make it their home.
textByHash.85924a6f56fbd6798289310fa793028e261646a7: Tecuani was unfortunately misled by the traitor Metzli. He joined with her cult along with a few other members of the Sect of Ranul.
textByHash.d0d43da70a26dabec6e983a577969d00b45448c6: Let us hope he can at least now find peace with Ranul.
textByHash.d5f055f3ad77dbd30325a90325e603427b4bc65f: However, the problem resolved itself in an unexpected way when he sadly fell from atop the temple steps. It seems it was a freak accident.
textByHash.e0da591f0884854a6de65437033050236ef06818: Timoiva, and may the sun light your way.
textByHash.eaf92ce83a71391a3a0eb7797f76d7cd7da9c89c: I am Jatziri, one of the seven teoki in service to Ralos. Along with my counterpart from the Sect of Ranul, I am responsible for the temple of Tal Teok.
textByHash.fb7337f1d1eab7e43cda6883fba8097b0508e2cf: Tal Teok is thankfully one of the easier holy sites to look after. That said, there was a small issue recently when some tourist decided to move in and make it their home.
